statement: In every magma, Equation 3853 (`x * y = (z * w) * (w * z)`) implies Equation 4605 (`(x * x) * y = (y * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0010
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op w z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x x) y) = (op (op y x) x)
